properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 67/19

NORWEGIAN SEA
1. SURVEY VESSEL POLAR DUCHESS CS 5BJC3 CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 01 JULY 2019 UNTIL 15 OCT 2019 
TOWING 12 X 6 NM LONG CABLES IN SURVEY AREA BOUNDED BY: 

A. 66-52N 001-18E
B. 67-15N 003-00E
C. 65-28N 005-24E
D. 65-35N 003-07E 

WIDE BERTH FROM AREA REQUESTED.
7 NM CLEARANCE REQUESTED ASTERN AND A 2.0 NM CLEARANCE IS REQUESTED AHEAD AND ABEAM OF THE VESSEL. 
SUPPORT VESSELS, M.V. SANCO SKY CS ZDHW AND MV MARJA CS YJVZ2 IN ATTENDANCE 
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 56/19
